title: Wally just notched a win in a new MLB mascot poll. Is he your No. 1?

bullets: Tell Us See where Wally the Green Monster placed among other faves like Phillie Phanatic, Mr.
Met, and "The Oriole Bird.
" Wally went international at a 2024 MLB event at Estadio Quisqueya in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic.

title: Naked man charged after allegedly attacking dog walker, pit bull in Ludlow
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Crime Asked why he was nude, Alexander Marano allegedly countered, “[Aren’t] we all naked at some point?

” By Abby Patkin June 8, 2026 | 12:52 PM 1 minute to read A Ludlow man is facing charges after he allegedly attacked a dog walker and choked the man’s pit bull — all while completely nude, according to police.

Alexander Marano, 34, is charged with disorderly conduct, threatening to use a deadly weapon, assault and battery, open and gross lewdness, indecent exposure, and cruelty to animals following the bizarre incident on Ludlow’s River Walk Sunday.

title: Did the story of ‘Mary Had a Little Lamb’ happen in Massachusetts?
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Wickedpedia A real girl, a devoted lamb, and a one-room schoolhouse in Sterling are at the center of the beloved nursery rhyme's origin story.
(AP Photo/Amanda Swinhart) Most people know the words by heart:“Mary had a little lamb,Its fleece was white as snow…” But was Mary real?
And did a little lamb actually follow her to school?

title: Here’s why thousands of squid washed up in Provincetown
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Local News Experts said the "die-off" was completely natural.
Thousands of squid washed up in Provincetown, the result of a "mass spawning die-off," according to the Provincetown Harbormaster's Office.
Jeff Krehely Beachgoers in Provincetown experienced a surprise Friday when thousands of squid were found washed up on the shore.

title: 22-year-old passenger dead in South Coast crash
author: John Waller
bullets: Local News The driver, a 23-year-old woman, sustained injuries that were not considered life-threatening.
By John Waller June 8, 2026 | 10:52 AM 1 minute to read A 22-year-old Dartmouth man was killed late Sunday afternoon when the car he was in crashed into a tree, officials said.
Dartmouth first responders were dispatched to the crash near 899 Old Fall River Road shortly after 4:30 p.
